name: @open-cowork/gateway
description: Headless Open Cowork channel gateway daemon

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @open-cowork/cloud-client build && pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-channel build && pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-telegram build && pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-webhook build && pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-testing build && tsc
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @open-cowork/cloud-client build && pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-channel build && pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-telegram build && pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-webhook build && pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-testing build && tsc --noEmit
